My account

Navigation principale - Mobile

  • Home
  • My meter reading
    • See my balance and bills
      Check what has been paid and what still needs to be paid. View and download your bills.
    • Change my instalment amount
      Adjust the amount to be paid in one click. Switch from quarterly to monthly instalments.
    • Choose direct debit
      Afraid of forgetting a bill? Request a direct debit in complete security.
    • Receive my bills by e-mail
      No more paper communications. You will receive everything directly in your email inbox.
    • My debt repayment plan
      Having financial difficulties? Stagger your bill payments.
    • Calculate my water bill
      An online simulator to calculate your bill based on a volume of m³.
    • Water prices
      The price of the water service in detail. We explain everything you need to know.
    • My SWDE bill in detail
      Questions about your bill? See detailed information.
    • See my history
      View the volume of m³ you have consumed in previous years.
    • Consumption simulator
      Answer a few questions to find out your household's potential consumption.
    • Track my consumption
      Do you want to better control your consumption and avoid surprises? Enter a monthly reading.
    • Tips for better consumption
      Water is precious. Find all our tips for smart consumption.
    • Hardness and quality of my water
      Enter your address to find out the composition and origin of your water.
    • Request a water test
      Analysis of all types of water by our laboratory. A fee is charged for this service.
    • Drinkability of water in the event of an incident
      SWDE's communication procedures when water is temporarily undrinkable.
    • SWDE quality controls
      Discover how SWDE inspects tap water: the most inspected food product in Wallonia.
    • I am a new customer
      Register online in a few clicks. Customer service will take care of the rest.
    • I am a customer and I am moving
      Follow the online procedure and your move will be notified in a few clicks.
    • I want to change my household composition
      Marriage, separation, divorce, death, etc.
    • I have a second home or an additional address
      To declare your additional residence, follow the procedure below.
    • I have a property to let and want to report a change
      Notify us of any changes to your rental property using our contact form
    • Information brochure
      Everything you need to know to submit your request.
    • Request for connection works
      New construction? Renovation? Removal? Complete the online form and attach all required technical documents.
    • Explanatory video
      In this practical video you will find all the steps to follow for a new connection.
    • Rates
      Applicable rates for your connection requests.
    • Temporary connection for construction sites
      Do you need water to supply your construction site during your work? Rent a gooseneck for a fee.
    • Request a network plan
      Check whether there are SWDE pipes underneath your construction site.

Breadcrumb

  1. Home
  2. My bills
  3. Water prices at SWDE

Water prices at SWDE

Chapô

To be drinkable, water must be treated before it reaches the tap. Several calculations therefore enter into water pricing.

Corps

How is the price of water calculated?

The price of water is calculated in the same way for all consumers served by SWDE. It is broken down into 4 elements:

 

1. True-cost of supply (CVD)

This takes into account all the charges relating to:

  • network maintenance (+ 40,000 km of pipes);
  • infrastructure renewal;
  • securing the supply, protection and monitoring of water catchments;
  • water purification;
  • customer management.

Calculated per m³ of water supplied, this is the remuneration SWDE earns for the services it provides in supplying you with a sufficient quantity of high-quality water.

The current CVD  amounts to € 3.24/m³.

 

2. True cost of sanitation (CVA)

This includes all charges related to wastewater treatment (sewage networks and treatment plants). This mission has been entrusted by the Government to the Société Publique de Gestion de l'Eau (SPGE).

The current CVA is € 2.748/m³.

 

3. VAT

For water supply, it amounts to 6 %.

 

4. Social Water Fund

This is a solidarity contribution from each customer living in the Walloon region.

This fund is intended to help people experiencing financial difficulties.

The current Social Water Fund  amounts to € 0.0339/m³.

 

Changing water prices at SWDE
